case_title: COAST NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. BEKZHAN ABDRAKHMANOV et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COAST NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT ABDRAKHMANOV, BEKZHAN DOES I TO V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-13-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-14-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-29-2011
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COAST NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-13-2012 CONTINUED TO MAR-16-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-30-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-16-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-30-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SET FOR APR-30-2012 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 610

AMENDED ORDER: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-30-2012 CONTINUED TO JUN-25-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-30-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-25-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
